ValidationRule.description: Don't allow change the Owner if the User has not filled in the required fields.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED(OwnerId), OR( AND( ($Profile.Name = "System Administrator"), ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, "") ), AND( ($Profile.Name = "Contract Manager"), OR(ISBLANK(Country), ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, "")) ), AND( $Profile.Name != "System Administrator", $Profile.Name != "Contract Manager", OR(ISBLANK(Country), ISPICKVAL(LeadSource, ""), ISBLANK(NumberOfEmployees) ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot change Owner if the required fields are not filled in: - System Admin: Lead Source - Contract Manager: Country + Lead Source - Others: Country + Lead Source + No. Employees (this cannot be less than 1)
